Review.title: Review
Review.description: A user review for the Nexus PDF application.

uid.description: The unique ID of the user who wrote the review.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

userPhoto.description: The photo URL of the user.

rating.description: The star rating given by the user (1-5).

comment.description: The text comment of the review.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the review was created.
